title: SEC2: Arc<Vec<String>> for lwd_endpoints in send_fn
description: In commands.rs send_fn_box, lwd_endpoints is captured as Vec<String>. Every payment call clones the entire Vec<String> (line 241: endpoints = lwd_endpoints.clone()) just to borrow it as Vec<&str> for connect_with_failover. Since lwd_endpoints is immutable after construction, wrapping it in Arc<Vec<String>> would reduce the per-payment clone to a pointer-bump. Fix: change capture to Arc<Vec<String>>; inside the async block, hold the Arc alive and borrow into Vec<&str> from it.
close_reason: opinion: Vec<String> clone of 1-3 strings is negligible vs network I/O cost; Arc adds complexity for no measurable gain
